description: Themed question banks. Load all YAML files under data/questions/ and concatenate. Each question has a category (name) for curriculum ordering. Difficulty 1 = easiest, 5 = hardest. Question selection is done by scripts/next_question.py (50% never-asked, 50% retry 0–2; weak-topic bias).
authoring: Prefer main question at lower (foundational) difficulty; follow-ups can be harder. **Follow-ups**: each question's follow_ups field is a list of question **ids** (e.g. follow_ups: [def_pvalue_01_interpret, def_pvalue_01_conclude]). Each follow-up must exist as a top-level question in the same format (id, topic, theme, difficulty, category, question, tags, optional reference_answer). Write follow-up questions so they stand on their own without needing the parent context.
